title: Mont-Clair Stainless Steel Water Bottle, Vacuum Insulated - BPA Free, 12h Hot & 24h Cold Drinks, Metal Water Bottle 500ml Leakproof, Ideal for Adult, Kids, Running - Black
features: 💦 STAY HYDRATED IN STYLE: These sleek and stylish stainless steel water bottles are perfect for on-the-go hydration. Double-walled insulation keeps your drinks icy cold for hours, so you can stay refreshed all day long.

💪 100% STAINLESS STEEL: No more worrying about spills! Our water bottle stainless steel features a secure, leakproof lid that prevents accidents. Made with premium-quality, durable stainless steel, this insulated bottle is built to withstand everyday wear and tear.

❄️ KEEPS DRINKS HOT OR COLD: This versatile thermal water bottle is insulated to keep your drinks at the perfect temperature. Whether you prefer your coffee piping hot or your water refreshingly cold, this 2-in-1 hot & cold water flask will keep your beverages exactly how you like them.
🍃 ECO-FRIENDLY & REUSABLE: Ditch single-use plastic bottles and make a positive impact on the environment. This reusable bottle is a sustainable way to stay hydrated wherever you go.
🏃 CONVENIENT AND PORTABLE: Available in different sizes and colors to fit your needs, the Mont-Clair cold water bottle is your ideal hydration companion for any adventure (Gym, Running, Biking, ...)
